'''âz-n-y''' ('''kazanay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lumine|lumine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lumine|lumine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-n-y
|-
! Lemma
| kazanay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizanay|thizanay]] || [[word:jizanay|jizanay]] || [[word:shizanay|shizanay]] || [[word:kizanay|kizanay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzanay|thuthuzanay]] || [[word:jujuzanay|jujuzanay]] || [[word:shushuzanay|shushuzanay]] || [[word:kukuzanay|kukuzanay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzanay|thuzanay]] || [[word:juzanay|juzanay]] || [[word:shuzanay|shuzanay]] || [[word:kuzanay|kuzanay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzanay|thuzanay]] || [[word:juzanay|juzanay]] || [[word:shuzanay|shuzanay]] || [[word:kuzanay|kuzanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezanay|thezanay]] || [[word:jezanay|jezanay]] || [[word:shezanay|shezanay]] || [[word:kezanay|kezanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozanay|thothozanay]] || [[word:jojozanay|jojozanay]] || [[word:shoshozanay|shoshozanay]] || [[word:kokozanay|kokozanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozanay|thozanay]] || [[word:jozanay|jozanay]] || [[word:shozanay|shozanay]] || [[word:kozanay|kozanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozanay|thozanay]] || [[word:jozanay|jozanay]] || [[word:shozanay|shozanay]] || [[word:kozanay|kozanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzanay|thĂŠzanay]] || [[word:jĂŠzanay|jĂŠzanay]] || [[word:shĂŠzanay|shĂŠzanay]] || [[word:kĂŠzanay|kĂŠzanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazanay|thathazanay]] || [[word:jajazanay|jajazanay]] || [[word:shashazanay|shashazanay]] || [[word:kakazanay|kakazanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazanay|thazanay]] || [[word:jazanay|jazanay]] || [[word:shazanay|shazanay]] || [[word:kazanay|kazanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazanay|thazanay]] || [[word:jazanay|jazanay]] || [[word:shazanay|shazanay]] || [[word:kazanay|kazanay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazanay|shazanay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazanay|goshazanay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazanay|gokishazanay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazanaynĂŒ|shazanaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazanaynknĂŒ|goshazanaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanaynĂŒ|gokishazanaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazanayshĂ«|shazanayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazanaynkshĂ«|goshazanaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazanayshĂ«|gokishazanayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanayro|shazanayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanaynkro|goshazanaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanayro|gokishazanayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanaymu|shazanaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanaynkmu|goshazanaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanaymu|gokishazanaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazanaysher|shazanaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazanaynksher|goshazanaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazanaysher|gokishazanaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazanayng|shazanayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazanaynkng|goshazanaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazanayng|gokishazanayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazanaya|shazanaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazanaynkya|goshazanaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazanaya|gokishazanaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazanayam|shazanayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazanaynkyam|goshazanaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazanayam|gokishazanayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanaynĂŒshĂ«|shazanaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshazanaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishazanaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanaynĂŒro|shazanaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanaynknĂŒro|goshazanaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanaynĂŒro|gokishazanaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanaynĂŒmu|shazanaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanaynknĂŒmu|goshazanaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanaynĂŒmu|gokishazanaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanayshĂ«nĂŒ|shazanayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazanaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazanayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanayshĂ«ro|shazanayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanaynkshĂ«ro|goshazanaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanayshĂ«ro|gokishazanayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanayshĂ«mu|shazanayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanaynkshĂ«mu|goshazanaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanayshĂ«mu|gokishazanayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanayronĂŒ|shazanayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanaynkronĂŒ|goshazanaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanayronĂŒ|gokishazanayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanayroshĂ«|shazanayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanaynkroshĂ«|goshazanaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanayroshĂ«|gokishazanayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazanayromu|shazanayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanaynkromu|goshazanaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazanayromu|gokishazanayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazanaymunĂŒ|shazanaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanaynkmunĂŒ|goshazanaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazanaymunĂŒ|gokishazanaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazanaymushĂ«|shazanaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanaynkmushĂ«|goshazanaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazanaymushĂ«|gokishazanaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazanaymuro|shazanaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanaynkmuro|goshazanaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazanaymuro|gokishazanaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|718161e}}
